CREATE TABLE numbers (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT a, b, a * b AS product FROM numbers;
SELECT a, b, (a * b) + 10 AS adjusted_product FROM numbers;
SELECT n.a, n.b, m.c, n.a * n.b * m.c AS final_product FROM numbers n JOIN more_numbers m ON n.a = n.b;
SELECT a, b, (SELECT AVG(c) FROM more_numbers) AS average_c, a * b * (SELECT AVG(c) FROM more_numbers) AS scaled_product FROM numbers;
INSERT INTO results SELECT a * b FROM numbers;
SELECT SUM(product) AS total_product FROM results;
SELECT MAX(product) AS max_product FROM (SELECT a * b AS product FROM numbers) subquery;
SELECT n.a, n.b, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM more_numbers) AS count_c, a * b / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM more_numbers) AS normalized_product FROM numbers n;
